exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the passive voice.

item.question: A confirmation email ______ (send) to the customer the moment an order is placed.
item.correct_answer: is sent
accepted_answers: is sent
item.explanation_ar: مضارع مبني للمجهول والفاعل مفرد ← is + التصريف الثالث (sent).

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the passive voice.

item.question: The new online store ______ (launch) at the start of next month.
item.correct_answer: will be launched
accepted_answers: will be launched
item.explanation_ar: مستقبل مبني للمجهول ← will be + التصريف الثالث (launched).

exercises.instructions_en: Put the verb in the passive voice.

item.question: Every step of the funnel ______ (plan) carefully, so nothing is left to chance.
item.correct_answer: has been planned
accepted_answers: has been planned
item.explanation_ar: مضارع تام مبني للمجهول والفاعل مفرد ← has been + التصريف الثالث (planned).

item.question: The website ______ this week, and any bugs are fixed before the launch.
item.correct_answer: is being tested
accepted_answers: is being tested
item.explanation_ar: شيء يصير الحين ومبني للمجهول ← is being + التصريف الثالث.

item.question: Customer data ______ by a secure payment system at every step.
item.correct_answer: is protected
accepted_answers: is protected
item.explanation_ar: مبني للمجهول لازم فعل be ← is + التصريف الثالث (protected).

item.question: Rewrite in the passive: A secure system handles all customer payments.
item.correct_answer: All customer payments are handled by a secure system.
accepted_answers: All customer payments are handled by a secure system.
Customer payments are handled by a secure system.
item.explanation_ar: المفعول (payments) يصير فاعل، والفعل ← are + التصريف الثالث + by للفاعل.

item.question: Rewrite in the passive: We sent the confirmation email automatically.
item.correct_answer: The confirmation email was sent automatically.
accepted_answers: The confirmation email was sent automatically.
The confirmation email was sent automatically by us.
item.explanation_ar: ماضي مبني للمجهول ← was + التصريف الثالث (sent).

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'The new store will launched next month, right on schedule.'
item.correct_answer: The new store will be launched next month, right on schedule.
accepted_answers: The new store will be launched next month, right on schedule.
item.explanation_ar: المبني للمجهول بعد will لازم be ← will be launched.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'All the product photos is edited by the design team before launch.'
item.correct_answer: All the product photos are edited by the design team before launch.
accepted_answers: All the product photos are edited by the design team before launch.
item.explanation_ar: الفاعل جمع (photos) ← are مو is.

item.question: Put the words in order: tested / is / The website / this / week / being
item.correct_answer: The website is being tested this week.
accepted_answers: The website is being tested this week.
item.explanation_ar: المضارع المستمر المبني للمجهول ← is being + التصريف الثالث.

units.topic_name_en: Purpose & Persuasion: so that / in order to / which means
units.topic_name_ar: الهدف والإقناع: so that و in order to و which means

exercises.instructions_en: Complete the purpose phrase with the verb.

item.question: We'll feature real customers in the videos ______ (build) trust with new buyers.
item.correct_answer: in order to build
accepted_answers: in order to build
item.explanation_ar: للهدف نستخدم in order to + الفعل في المصدر (build).

item.question: We'll post one story each week ______ our audience stays engaged all winter.
item.correct_answer: so that
accepted_answers: so that
item.explanation_ar: so that تجي قبل جملة كاملة (فاعل + فعل) للتعبير عن الهدف.

item.question: We'll work with micro-influencers, ______ we reach a loyal audience at a lower cost.
item.correct_answer: which means
accepted_answers: which means
item.explanation_ar: which means تربط النقطة بفائدتها والنتيجة اللي تجي منها.

item.question: We're creating a video series ______ build trust with new customers.
item.correct_answer: in order to
accepted_answers: in order to
item.explanation_ar: قبل فعل في المصدر (build) نستخدم in order to؛ so that لازم بعدها جملة كاملة.

item.question: We'll partner with three micro-influencers, ______ we reach a loyal audience at a lower cost.
item.correct_answer: which means
accepted_answers: which means
item.explanation_ar: الصيغة الصحيحة which means؛ الفعل يجي means مع which.

item.question: Join with 'so that': We'll add a simple hashtag. + Customers can share their own stories.
item.correct_answer: We'll add a simple hashtag so that customers can share their own stories.
accepted_answers: We'll add a simple hashtag so that customers can share their own stories.
We will add a simple hashtag so that customers can share their own stories.
item.explanation_ar: so that تربط الفعل بهدفه وتجي قبل جملة كاملة.

item.question: Join with 'which means': Real stories are more memorable than polished ads. + People remember our brand longer.
item.correct_answer: Real stories are more memorable than polished ads, which means people remember our brand longer.
accepted_answers: Real stories are more memorable than polished ads, which means people remember our brand longer.
item.explanation_ar: which means تشرح الفائدة الناتجة عن النقطة.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'We'll release one video each week in order to keeping the momentum going.'
item.correct_answer: We'll release one video each week in order to keep the momentum going.
accepted_answers: We'll release one video each week in order to keep the momentum going.
We will release one video each week in order to keep the momentum going.
item.explanation_ar: بعد in order to الفعل يجي في المصدر (keep) مو -ing.

item.question: Find and correct the error: 'Each video tells one honest story so that viewers to feel a real connection.'
item.correct_answer: Each video tells one honest story so that viewers feel a real connection.
accepted_answers: Each video tells one honest story so that viewers feel a real connection.
item.explanation_ar: بعد so that تجي جملة كاملة بدون to ← viewers feel.

item.question: Put the words in order: build / in order to / We / trust / real stories / use
item.correct_answer: We use real stories in order to build trust.
accepted_answers: We use real stories in order to build trust.
item.explanation_ar: in order to + فعل في المصدر (build) للتعبير عن الهدف.
